meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Build a Portfolio-Ready Project (2025)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with empty portfolios. Learn to leverage AI debugging, Antigravity, and Claude Code to build professional-grade software projects today.
content.answer_block: Transform your portfolio by mastering AI-driven debugging. By integrating Antigravity and Claude Code into your workflow, you move from 'student coder' to 'systems architect.' This methodology allows you to solve complex technical bugs rapidly, demonstrating to employers that you can ship production-ready, resilient code consistently and efficiently.
content.intro:
The blinking cursor of an empty IDE is the graveyard of potential. You have the theoretical knowledge, yet your portfolio remains a barren landscape of generic tutorials and 'To-Do' apps that fail to impress hiring managers. The gap between your current skills and a career-ready developer isn't just code—it is the ability to navigate the labyrinth of production-level bugs.

We are shifting the paradigm. By treating AI not as a cheat code, but as a senior pair programmer, you will dismantle complex technical debt and surface-level errors that stall development. This tutorial equips you with the exact technical stack to transform your debugging process into a showcase of problem-solving expertise.

steps.title: Analyze the Technical Debt
steps.description: Identify a complex bug in your codebase that prevents feature completion. Use AI to map the dependency graph and pinpoint the root cause.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for architectural bottlenecks and suggest a refactoring path to resolve current runtime errors.

steps.title: Generate Context-Aware Fixes
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate a surgical fix that adheres to your existing design patterns instead of patching over the issue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current logic and propose a fix that maintains strict type safety and performance standards.

steps.title: Automate Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure your fix doesn't break existing features. Leverage AI to write comprehensive unit tests for the newly patched logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Jest unit tests that verify the edge cases of the recent fix.

steps.title: Document the Resolution
steps.description: Write professional commit messages and documentation that explain the 'why' behind the fix, showcasing your senior-level communication.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize this debugging session into a technical blog post snippet for a portfolio project README.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message "Fix: Resolve race condition in auth service via event-driven refactor"

steps.title: Validate Production Readiness
steps.description: Perform a final audit to ensure the code is production-ready, focusing on security vulnerabilities and performance overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit this module for OWASP security vulnerabilities and provide a list of 3 performance optimizations.

pro_tips: Never accept the first AI suggestion; always ask for 'three alternative architectural approaches' to show you understand trade-offs.
Use Claude Code to explain your code to a 'rubber duck'—the process of prompting the AI forces you to clarify your own logic.
Keep a 'Bug Journal' where you document the prompt that fixed a particularly nasty bug; this is gold for technical interviews.
Focus on fixing bugs in open-source projects rather than your own; it proves you can contribute to existing, complex codebases.
Configure Antigravity to ignore your node_modules folder to keep the context window clean and the AI responses focused.
content.next_steps: Refactor your entire project using these AI-assisted steps, then deploy your application to Vercel or AWS, and link your 'Bug Journal' in your GitHub README to show hiring managers your problem-solving process.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' project. Use these tools to turn your messy code into a masterclass of engineering. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
